description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI [RHEL8] that runs on push and pull request events to devel and release branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have concurrent runs cancelled if a newer run starts on a PR. It should use an ubuntu-latest environment with a RHEL8 container to run three jobs: Framework, Ref, and UTs. Each job should install dependencies, check out the repository, run a setup action, and then perform specific build and test tasks.
